titleStmt.title: SII 10.528: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 528. (A.R. No. 163 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURTYARD OF THE TEMPLE OF VĪRANĀRĀYAṆASVĀMI AT PĀṆEM, NANDYAL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1241. (Siddhārthi)

summary.p: States that Mummaḍi Juṭṭaya-Leṅka, governor of Peḍakallu and other Southern districts during the reign of Pratāpa-Rudradēva, made a gift of the fees (mēras) payable by people of several classes to the temple of Vīranārāyaṇa at Pānyamu and that he also ordered that a tūmu of grain should be given to the said temple in respect of grains sold in the markets of certain specified villages.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
trailōkyasaṁrakṣaṇadīkṣitā yē lakṣmīsamāliṁganasaukhyabhājaḥ . śrīvīranārāyaṇa bāhava stēbhavaṁ
tu bhūtyai bhavatā mmahatyai . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya kākatikulakamalamā ¨rttaṁḍa calama¨rttigaṁḍa mūrurā
ya jagaddaḷa kaliyugarāmabhadra pratāparudradēvamahārāyalu Ōruṁgaṁṭanu sāṁ mrājyamu
sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu tatpādapadmārādhaka mūrulōkadagaṁḍḍa mū¨rttimukuṁda kuṁtatri nētra
kolipākagōva birudaṁkarudrabiruda brahmarākṣana śrīmanmahāpradhāni kaṭyakolinā yaṁku laina mu
mmaḍijuṭṭayaleṁkaṁgāru peḍakallu modalaina dakṣiṇadēśālu yēlucunna svasti śrīśaka varṣaṁbulu 1241 A
gu siddhā¨rtthisaṁvatsara māgha śu 15 sōmavārāna sōmagrahaṇapuṇyakālamaṁdu tama kunu [Ā]yurā
rōgyādyaiśva¨ryyābhivṛddhigānu pānyamu śrīvīranārāyaṇadēvuni raṁgabhōgamu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu cellanu
dhārāpū¨rvvaka mai yiccina mēralu pānyāna dakṣiṇasthalāna manemunaṁdu [Oḍḍu gaṁḍḍla]ceṟvunīrunēla ma 1 pā
nemaṁdu balijevāru re 20 sthalakaraṇālu re 10 suṁkyaAdhikāri re 10 Ākutōṭa vāru re 10 kōma
ṭya re 10 baccumaḍuvāru re 5 gā ngulavāru re rājulu re 10 togaṭasanevāru 10 Ūrata
lāri re 5 krōnāla suṁkyaAdhikāri re 10 pānyamu re 5 koṇijaḍu . yaḍa vula sa
hitamu neravāḍu . cilukala . balapanūru . goruvakala . dēva¨rbbāsi . gaḍḍigaṟē vulu . nya jūṭū
ru . karimaddulu . kākinūru . yeṟṟaguṁṭalu . pulupaṭṭi . yaḍavulasahitamu maddūru .
rāvipāḍu . liṁgālakaṁgaṭūru . vallaṁpāḍu . vēmulu [.] palukūru . mālepāḍu . go
nudinna . munugunūtulu . bīraprōlu . koravi . Allamūru . [gauḍiva¨rggamu] . krāsāla . dūbaguṁ
ṭalu . pennaṟulu ciṁtakuṁṭa . gōsupāḍu juṁ . guṁṭa prāpulu .
rēvuḍūru . gonudinna verasi Ūḷlu jonnalati ya pēranu valapu tūmeḍu saṁta
rāśidhānyamūnu . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmasētu[¨rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāla] nīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sa¨rvvā nētā
nbhāvinaḥ pā¨rtthivēṁdrā nbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ parada
ttānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanayō ¨rmmadhyē dānā cchrēyō
nupālanaṁ . dānā tsva¨rgga mavāpnōti pālanā dacyutaṁ padaṁ . śubha mastu maṁgaḷa mahāśrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 10.528 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
